observed_blocker: In-place mutation of ops/connected-worker/runtime-policy.json would invalidate immutable R04E dependency verification. Historical worker policy and provider profile must remain byte-identical while current v3 artifacts are additive.

required_change.model_worker_selection: Accept only exact historical v2 or exact current v3 profile digest and instantiate the matching explicit path; unknown digest fails closed.
required_change.container_default: Use runtime-policy-v3.json for the current image while retaining runtime-policy.json as immutable historical input.

acceptance_commands: no-cache linux/arm64 image defaults to runtime-policy-v3 and validates exact v3/tool hashes
fresh v3-bound private two-role proof succeeds
stop_conditions: historical runtime-policy.json v1/v2 profile or R04E proof bytes change
Agent 5 mutates tools provenance or stages
candidate becomes non-null before pre-cut PASS
force push rebase history rewrite or live action
